title: Add Board Notification Setting to Limit Notifications and Still Receive Automations
excerpt: Our users are asking for a solution to limit the number of notifications they receive from the Deals board in monday Sales CRM (and similar). Currently, board notifications offer three options. '“Receive notifications on…

posts.author: vvollmar (Vicari Vollmar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our users are asking for a solution to limit the number of notifications they receive from the Deals board in monday Sales CRM (and similar). Currently, board notifications offer three options. '“Receive notifications only for mentions and assigns” helps limit notifications, but this option prevents users from receiving critical automated notifications. I tried including the dynamic tag {item’s person} in the automated notification, but monday doesn’t consider this a mention.

We need an option that allows users to limit notifications per board (or broadly) to prevent notification overload, but still receive critical automated notifications.
